parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints WHERE is_deleted = 'No') AS total_all, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved'))) AS total_open, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND cl.status IN ('Closed','Resolved')) AS total_closed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints WHERE is_deleted = 'No' AND DATE(created) = CURDATE()) AS logged_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints WHERE is_deleted = 'No' AND YEARWEEK(created, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1)) AS logged_week, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints WHERE is_deleted = 'No' AND YEAR(created) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created) = MONTH(CURDATE())) AS logged_month, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND DATE(cl.created) = CURDATE() AND cl.status IN ('Closed','Resolved')) AS closed_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND YEARWEEK(cl.created, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1) AND cl.status IN ('Closed','Resolved')) AS closed_week, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND YEAR(cl.created) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(cl.created) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND cl.status IN ('Closed','Resolved')) AS closed_month, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) LEFT JOIN vmm_vendorescalations ve ON ve.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_vendorescalations WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved')) AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) > 7) AS critical

SELECT c.id, c.complaintno, c.productname, c.vendorname, cs.storecode, cs.storename AS store_name, cs.storecity AS city, COALESCE(cl.status, 'Open') AS status, ve.closuredate, CASE WHEN ve.closuredate IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) ELSE NULL END AS days_overdue FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintstores cs ON cs.id = c.storerefid LEFT JOIN vmm_vendorescalations ve ON ve.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_vendorescalations WHERE complaintid = c.id) LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved')) ORDER BY CASE WHEN ve.closuredate IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, c.created DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT cs.uid, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS logged, SUM(CASE WHEN cl.status IN ('Closed','Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed, SUM(CASE WHEN cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintstores cs ON cs.id = c.storerefid LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND YEAR(c.created) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(c.created) = MONTH(CURDATE()) GROUP BY cs.uid ORDER BY logged DESC
